Notice Of Plaintiffs Motion To Vacate Judgment [Code Civ. Proc. 473]
Off Calendar Feb-05-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF BORIS TEPLITSKY'S Motion To Vacate Judgment [CCP 473], as follows:

Plaintiff Boris Teplitsky's motion to vacate the judgment entered against him on January 4, 2018 is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Mr. Teplitsky is given leave to file an untimely request for trial de novo no later than February 9, 2018 and, once he does so, the case will be restored to the civil active list.

ORDER SIGNED after hearing. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: torreanom@aol.com; mtorreano@sftc.org.
